items.title: When to Align, When to Predict: A Phase Diagram for Multimodal Learning
items.tldr: Cross-modal alignment (CA) and cross-modal prediction (CP) are the dominant paradigms for multimodal representation learning, yet there is no systematic understanding of when each succeeds, when each fails, and when… (arXiv preprint)

items.title: A Unifying Lens on Supervised Fine-Tuning Through Target Distribution Design
items.tldr: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) typically maximizes the likelihood of every token in a demonstrated trajectory. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents
items.tldr: In this paper, we propose EEVEE, the first multi-dataset test-time prompt learning framework for LLM agents, enabling test-time prompt learning under real-world task streams. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: The Role of Feedback Alignment in Self-Distillation
items.tldr: Conditioning a language model on additional context, such as feedback on a previous attempt, typically improves its response. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Predicting Future Behaviors in Reasoning Models Enables Better Steering
items.tldr: Deployed large reasoning models (LRMs) often behave unexpectedly. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Algorithmic and Minimax Complexities in Kernel Bandits
items.tldr: Gaussian-process upper confidence bound (GP-UCB) and decision-estimation-coefficient (DEC) methods may appear, at first sight, to belong to different theories. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Piper: A Programmable Distributed Training System
items.tldr: Large-scale model training increasingly relies on composing multiple parallelism strategies, such as data, pipeline, and expert parallelism, together with memory-saving optimizations like ZeRO. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Flaws in the LLM Automation Narrative
items.tldr: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly described as performing at the level of human experts on knowledge economy tasks. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: ReasonAlloc: Hierarchical Decoding-Time KV Cache Budget Allocation for Reasoning Models
items.tldr: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories in large language model (LLM) reasoning cause severe inference bottlenecks due to rapid key-value (KV) cache growth. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: COGENT: Continuous Graph Emulators with Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Long-Term Physical Forecasting
items.tldr: In this work, we present COGENT, a continuous graph emulator with Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for long-term physical forecasting on irregular geospatial meshes. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Itô maps for any-step SDEs
items.tldr: Recent one-step generative models accelerate sampling by learning deterministic flow maps of the underlying dynamics. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: ABC-Bench: An Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark for Biosecurity
items.tldr: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly acquiring capabilities relevant to biological research, from literature synthesis to interpretation of experimental data. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Efficiently Learning Drifting Halfspaces with Massart Noise
items.tldr: We study the problem of learning a drifting concept in the presence of Massart noise. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: OncoTraj: a public benchmark for longitudinal resistance prediction in EGFR-mutant non-small-cell lung cancer on osimertinib
items.tldr: Resistance to first-line osimertinib in EGFR-mutant non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC) is the canonical example of predictable clonal evolution under therapeutic pressure, yet no public benchmark exists for training or… (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Data assimilation for subsurface flow using latent diffusion model parameterization: performance of ensemble-Kalman and Monte Carlo techniques
items.tldr: Data assimilation (DA) in subsurface flow entails calibrating model parameters to match observed data, typically at wells, while preserving geological realism. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: First-Order Trajectory Matching: Fast Ensemble Predictions of Chaotic, Turbulent, Stochastic Systems
items.tldr: We introduce First-Order Trajectory Matching (FTM), a surrogate-modeling method that learns the first-order local transport of probability mass from trajectories of stochastic systems. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Robust Regression of General ReLUs with Queries
items.tldr: We study the task of agnostically learning general (as opposed to homogeneous) ReLUs under the Gaussian distribution with respect to the squared loss. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Provenance-Grounded Gating and Adaptive Recovery in Synthetic Post-Training Data Curation
items.tldr: Synthetic post-training pipelines commonly filter generated samples with reward models or holistic LLM judges, yet two practices remain rarely examined together: whether the filtering signal is grounded in the source… (arXiv preprint)

items.title: DMT: Demographic Conditioning, Morphology-Enhanced Transformer for Cuffless Blood Pressure Estimation from PPG Signals
items.tldr: Blood pressure (BP) is a key marker for cardiovascular risk assessment and therapeutic decision-making, and Photoplethysmography (PPG) enables low-cost, wearable-friendly cuffless BP estimation. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
items.tldr: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

items.title: Overcoming Rank Collapse in Feedback Alignment
items.tldr: Backpropagation (BP) is widely viewed as biologically implausible, in part because it requires feedback weights to be the transpose of forward weights for error propagation. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Monte Carlo Pass Search: Using Trajectory Generation for 3D Counterfactual Pass Evaluation in Football
items.tldr: We recast pass evaluation in football (soccer) as a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS)-like evaluation problem whose components mostly exist in the literature under different names: a value model (possession value), a world… (arXiv preprint)

items.title: TRACE: A Unified Rollout Budget Allocation Framework for Efficient Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.tldr: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a promising approach for enhancing reasoning and agentic behavior in large language models. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Data-Driven Dynamic Assortment in Online Platforms: Learning about Two Sides
items.tldr: We study a dynamic assortment problem on a two-sided service platform with incomplete information and heterogeneous customers in a discrete-time setting. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Towards Autonomous Accelerator Design: FPGA Accelerator Generation with SECDA
items.tldr: Designing FPGA-based accelerators for modern artificial intelligence workloads requires exploring a large and complex hardware design space that involves architectural parameters, data flow strategies, and memory… (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Designed by Journalists, but Is It for Readers? Rethinking AI Disclosures and Transparency in News
items.tldr: As newsrooms integrate generative AI, journalists face a disclosure challenge: how to communicate AI involvement in ways that maintain reader trust. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: NASA Marches Toward Artemis III Mission in 2027, Names Crew Members
items.tldr: Taking another step toward one of the most complex human spaceflight missions in recent history, NASA on Tuesday provided new Artemis III details and announced the four prime crew members and a backup for the test…

items.title: Launch: HASTE | Curveball
items.tldr: Sub-orbital launch under Rocket Lab’s Hypersonic Accelerator Suborbital Test Electron (HASTE) program, details TBD.

items.title: June 2026 Satellite Puzzler
items.tldr: Your challenge is to tell us the location of the satellite image and why it is interesting.

items.title: Quantum statistics in an extended collider coupled to a qubit
items.tldr: Mesoscopic colliders provide an effective platform for probing the mutual statistics of quantum particles. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: The Yang-Baxter Equation for the Chiral Potts Model and Integrable Parafermions
items.tldr: A new type of Yang-Baxter equation (YBE) for $R$-matrices parameterized by three spectral parameters is constructed from the star-triangle and star-star relations for the chiral Potts model. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Coset Ensemble Decoder for Quantum Error Correction with Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design
items.tldr: Reliable large-scale quantum computation relies on fault-tolerant architectures, where quantum error correction (QEC) continuously extracts and decodes error syndromes in real time. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Interplay between photon condensation and electron-electron interactions in molecular systems
items.tldr: We investigate a minimal molecular model consisting of square planar plaquettes hosting multiple electrons, whose dynamics is governed by a tight-binding Hamiltonian supplemented by on-site Hubbard repulsion. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: On pseudogap phase as precursor to a superconducting dome in high-Tc cuprates: Non-analytic T* as a function of doping
items.tldr: We generalize the condition under which a quantum material exhibiting a pseudogap phase is a precursor to a superconducting (SC) dome. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: Colloquium: Nuclear clocks
items.tldr: The Th-229 nuclear isomeric state has the lowest energy of all known nuclear excited states, placing it within the reach of current table-top laser technology. (arXiv preprint)

items.title: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works

items.title: Bosonic Cyclic Codes: Trading Stabilizers for Gaussian Non-Clifford Phase Gates
items.tldr: Bosonic codes offer hardware-efficient approaches to quantum error correction, with the best encodings offering effective protection of idle quantum information against loss and dephasing - particularly… (arXiv preprint)
